channel.title: Surfaced — Discover What's Next
channel.description: Fresh discoveries, trending products, hidden gems, future tech, and daily tools — curated every day.

item.title: Lapce
item.description: Lapce is a fast, powerful, and intuitive code editor built in Rust. It's designed from the ground up for performance, utilizing a modern rendering engine and asynchronous operations to provide a seamless editing experience, even with large projects. Lapce offers features such as intelligent code completion, syntax highlighting, multi-cursor editing, and integrated debugging capabilities. It is a free and open-source project, aiming to provide a robust alternative to established editors for developers who value speed and efficiency. Its native Rust implementation contributes to its remarkable responsiveness and low memory footprint.

item.title: Textual
item.description: Textual is a modern Python framework for building sophisticated terminal user interfaces (TUIs) and interactive command-line applications. It allows developers to create rich, graphical-like experiences directly within the terminal, complete with widgets, layouts, animations, and asynchronous event handling. Textual is free and open-source, making powerful TUI development accessible to a wide range of users. It excels at enabling developers to build complex applications that are both powerful and highly portable, running across various operating systems without modification. A standout feature is its CSS-like styling system, which simplifies the process of designing and customizing the look and feel of terminal applications.

item.title: Forgejo
item.description: Forgejo is a free and open-source, self-hosted Git service that provides a secure and performant platform for code collaboration and project management. It offers features such as Git repository hosting, issue tracking, pull requests, wikis, and CI/CD integration. Forgejo is designed to be a community-driven fork of Gitea, emphasizing a more permissive license and a focus on user control and privacy. It is completely free to use, with no enterprise editions or hidden costs, making it an attractive option for individuals and organizations that want full ownership of their code infrastructure. Its core value lies in providing a comprehensive and robust alternative to cloud-based Git hosting services.

item.title: LLMOps Community
item.description: LLMOps Community is a collaborative effort focused on defining and promoting best practices for Machine Learning Operations (MLOps) specifically tailored for Large Language Models (LLMs). It provides resources, discussions, and frameworks to help organizations effectively deploy, manage, and monitor LLMs in production. The community addresses challenges such as model versioning, data drift, performance monitoring, and cost optimization in the context of LLMs. It operates as a free, community-driven initiative with no direct pricing, relying on shared knowledge and open-source contributions. A key benefit is its focus on the unique lifecycle and operational demands of LLMs, which differ significantly from traditional machine learning models.

item.title: AOS Community Edition
item.description: AOS Community Edition (AOS-CE) is an open-source operating system designed for building and managing autonomous agents. It provides a robust framework for developing AI agents that can perform complex tasks, interact with their environment, and collaborate with other agents. The system is built in Rust, emphasizing safety and performance. AOS-CE aims to standardize agent development by offering a flexible and extensible platform. It operates on a free and open-source model, encouraging community contributions and rapid innovation. A core strength lies in its ability to orchestrate multiple agents, allowing for the creation of sophisticated multi-agent systems.

item.title: Coolors.co
item.description: Coolors.co is a highly regarded, freemium online tool for generating, exploring, and saving color palettes. It allows users to quickly lock colors they like and generate complementary shades, or explore trending palettes created by the community. You can also extract colors from uploaded images. The platform offers a free tier with extensive functionality, with paid options for advanced features like project organization and API access. It's particularly adept at helping designers find visually appealing and harmonious color schemes for websites, branding, and any creative project.

item.title: Font Pair
item.description: Font Pair is a free, web-based tool that helps designers and content creators discover harmonious font combinations for their projects. It showcases Google Fonts that pair well together, categorized by popular pairings and styles like serif and sans-serif. Users can browse curated lists or input their own primary font to receive suggestions. This eliminates the tedious trial-and-error process of finding complementary typefaces. The site is entirely free to use, making it an accessible resource for anyone looking to enhance their visual typography.

item.title: Glaze
item.description: Glaze is a free desktop application designed to protect visual artists' work from being scraped and used to train AI art generators without permission. It works by applying subtle, imperceptible 'cloaking' layers to digital artwork, altering the way AI models interpret and learn from the images. This process ensures that AI models cannot accurately mimic the artist's unique style. Glaze is a crucial tool for artists concerned about intellectual property and the ethical implications of AI in creative fields, providing a tangible way to safeguard their artistic identity.

item.title: Vellum
item.description: Vellum is an elegant and intuitive desktop application designed specifically for formatting ebooks and print books. It allows authors to easily create beautifully designed books from their manuscript files, handling complex layout tasks such as chapter breaks, typography, table of contents generation, and image embedding with remarkable simplicity. Vellum operates on a one-time purchase model, offering unlimited book formatting for a single price. It's celebrated for producing professional-looking books with minimal effort, far surpassing the capabilities of standard word processors for book production.

item.title: OrbStack
item.description: OrbStack is a modern, lightning-fast runtime for Docker, Application, and functions on macOS. It offers a unified interface to manage containers, local AI models, and cloud-native applications, streamlining development workflows for macOS users. It's a freemium tool, with a free tier offering core functionality and paid tiers for advanced features and team collaboration. OrbStack excels at providing a deeply integrated and performant experience for local development environments.

item.title: Briefmatic
item.description: Briefmatic is an AI-powered tool designed to help creative agencies, freelancers, and businesses generate comprehensive client briefs and project proposals with remarkable efficiency. It guides users through a series of questions to capture project scope, goals, target audience, and deliverables, then uses this information to draft a structured and detailed brief. The platform aims to eliminate the guesswork and time-consuming process of initiating new projects. Briefmatic operates on a paid subscription model, offering different tiers based on usage and features. It excels at ensuring all critical project details are captured upfront, setting a solid foundation for successful project execution.

item.title: Reflect
item.description: Reflect is a modern note-taking application that focuses on bi-directional linking, hierarchical organization, and a clean, distraction-free interface. It allows users to build a networked knowledge base by easily connecting notes, ideas, and projects. Key features include backlinking, tagging, powerful search, and collaboration capabilities. Reflect operates on a freemium model, offering a robust free tier for individual use and paid plans for enhanced features and team collaboration.

item.title: BookStack
item.description: BookStack is a simple, self-hosted, and opinionated wiki system that makes it easy to create, organize, and display documentation. It structures content into books, chapters, and pages, offering a clear hierarchical organization ideal for knowledge bases, internal wikis, and project documentation. BookStack is open-source and free to use, requiring only a server environment for deployment. It stands out for its user-friendly interface and straightforward content management, making it accessible even for non-technical users to create and maintain comprehensive documentation.

item.title: Eagle
item.description: Eagle is a robust digital asset management tool designed for designers, artists, and creators to collect, organize, and manage their inspiration and work files. It supports a vast array of file types, including images, videos, audio, and 3D models, allowing users to tag, categorize, and search their entire digital library with ease. Eagle operates on a one-time purchase model, offering lifetime access to the software and its features. It excels at providing a visual and highly searchable repository for creative assets, preventing inspiration from getting lost in a chaotic digital folder structure.

item.title: Linguascope
item.description: Linguascope is a subscription-based online platform offering a vast library of interactive games and activities designed to make learning new languages fun and engaging. It covers a wide range of languages, including French, Spanish, German, Italian, and Mandarin, with content tailored for different proficiency levels from beginner to advanced. The platform gamifies the learning process through quizzes, matching games, listening exercises, and vocabulary builders, making it an excellent alternative to traditional textbook methods. Linguascope is particularly effective for reinforcing vocabulary and grammar in a low-pressure, enjoyable environment.

item.title: Archive Today
item.description: Archive Today is a user-friendly, web-based service that allows individuals and organizations to easily capture and preserve digital content from the web. It enables users to create high-fidelity archives of websites, articles, and specific web pages for later reference or as a safeguard against content removal. The service offers a free tier for basic archiving needs and paid plans for more extensive storage and features. Its core value lies in its simplicity and reliability for ensuring that important digital information remains accessible, functioning as a personal Wayback Machine for specific needs, far simpler to use for one-off saves than institutional archives.

item.title: Osmosis AI
item.description: Osmosis AI is an advanced educational platform dedicated to making complex medical knowledge accessible and understandable. It leverages AI to break down intricate medical concepts into clear, concise explanations, visual aids, and interactive learning modules. Primarily aimed at medical students, healthcare professionals, and educators, Osmosis AI offers a freemium model, with core content available for free and advanced features and expanded libraries through subscription. Its strength lies in its ability to synthesize and present dense medical information in digestible formats, making it easier to learn and retain critical information.

item.title: Archival Research Hub
item.description: The Archival Research Hub is a curated online platform that aggregates and provides access to a vast collection of digitized historical documents from various institutions worldwide. It aims to democratize access to primary source materials for researchers, students, and history enthusiasts. The service is free, supported by grants and institutional partnerships, and excels at cross-referencing and searching across diverse archival collections that might otherwise be siloed. Users can discover and analyze original texts, images, and audio recordings from different historical periods and geographical locations.

item.title: scroll-world
item.description: scroll-world is a JavaScript library that transforms any brand's visual identity into an immersive, scrollable 3D world. It allows developers to create unique interactive experiences where users can navigate through a virtual representation of a brand's ecosystem. The library is open-source and free to use, offering a novel way to engage audiences. Its primary function is to translate flat brand assets into a dynamic, three-dimensional space, making brand exploration more engaging than traditional websites.

item.title: Advocacy AI
item.description: Advocacy AI is a platform designed to help individuals and organizations amplify their messages and mobilize support for social causes or campaigns. It leverages AI to help draft compelling content, identify key influencers, and strategize outreach across various digital channels. This paid tool provides analytics and campaign management features to track impact and refine messaging, aiming to make advocacy more efficient and effective.

item.title: Polywork
item.description: Polywork is a professional networking platform designed to foster more meaningful connections beyond traditional job titles and resumes. Instead of static profiles, users create dynamic 'offerings' and 'requests,' allowing them to showcase what they're good at and what they're looking for in collaborators, mentors, or even just interesting conversations. This freemium tool simplifies the process of finding people for specific projects, skill-sharing, or career advice by focusing on actionable interactions.

item.title: Jasper
item.description: Jasper is an AI-powered writing assistant that helps users generate various forms of written content, from blog posts and marketing copy to social media updates and creative stories. It leverages advanced language models to brainstorm ideas, overcome writer's block, and produce high-quality drafts quickly. Jasper operates on a subscription-based model, offering different tiers based on usage and features. It is particularly effective at producing marketing-oriented content at scale, acting as a powerful co-pilot for content creators and marketers.

item.title: Amplenote
item.description: Amplenote is a powerful productivity tool that seamlessly integrates note-taking with task management, offering a unique approach to organizing your thoughts and to-dos. It allows users to embed tasks directly within rich text notes, create bi-directional links between notes, and manage projects with a flexible calendar view. The service operates on a freemium model, with advanced features available through paid subscriptions. Amplenote excels at creating a connected web of information, ensuring that context is never lost between your ideas and the actions you need to take.

item.title: Circle
item.description: Circle is a modern community platform designed for creators, brands, and businesses to build thriving online communities. It offers a centralized space for members to connect, engage in discussions, share content, and participate in events, all without the distractions of traditional social media. The platform is freemium, with paid tiers offering advanced features for larger or more complex communities. Circle excels at providing a branded, focused experience that fosters deeper connections and knowledge sharing.

item.title: Cinemagoer
item.description: Cinemagoer is a sophisticated yet intuitive app designed for cinephiles and TV enthusiasts to meticulously track their viewing habits. It allows users to log every movie and TV show they watch, rate them, write reviews, and discover new content based on their preferences and what their friends are enjoying. The app also provides personalized recommendations and helps users curate watchlists for future viewing. Cinemagoer operates on a freemium model, offering core tracking features for free with premium tiers unlocking advanced analytics and social features.

item.title: Song Exploder
item.description: Song Exploder is a highly acclaimed podcast and media project where musicians take apart their songs, and piece by piece, tell the story of how they were made. Each episode offers an intimate look into the creative process, as artists break down their tracks, explaining the inspiration, the instruments, the vocal performances, and the production techniques used. It's a fascinating auditory journey into the heart of music creation, offering unique insights that are rarely shared publicly. The podcast is free to listen to on all major podcast platforms, with accompanying transcripts and sometimes visual elements available on their website.

item.title: Letterboxd
item.description: Letterboxd is a social networking service for film enthusiasts to track, share, and discover movies. Users can log films they've watched, rate them, write reviews, create lists, and follow other users to see their cinematic journeys. The platform also offers curated content, news, and discussions around the world of cinema. It operates on a freemium model, with a robust free tier and an optional Pro membership for enhanced features. Letterboxd uniquely combines personal film journaling with a vibrant community, making it the go-to place for serious movie buffs to engage with their passion.

item.title: Codex-Dream-Skin
item.description: Codex-Dream-Skin is a PowerShell module designed to dramatically enhance the visual appearance and user experience of the Windows Terminal. It allows users to apply custom themes, color schemes, font styles, and even transparency effects to their terminal sessions, transforming a utilitarian interface into something more personalized and aesthetically pleasing. The tool is free to use, leveraging PowerShell scripting to modify terminal settings. It excels at providing a highly customizable and visually appealing command-line environment that can reduce eye strain and make long coding or system administration sessions more enjoyable.

item.title: grok-build
item.description: grok-build is a powerful, extensible, and fully interactive terminal UI (TUI) for harnessing SpaceXAI's coding agents. It provides a fullscreen, mouse-driven interface designed for efficient interaction with AI-powered development tools. This tool aims to streamline the process of interacting with and managing complex AI coding assistants, allowing developers to leverage their capabilities more effectively within a familiar command-line environment. grok-build is open-source and free to use, with a focus on extensibility to support a growing ecosystem of AI coding agents.

item.title: LingoDeer
item.description: LingoDeer is a language-learning app designed to provide a structured and comprehensive approach to mastering new languages, particularly focusing on East Asian languages but also offering many others. It breaks down grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation into digestible lessons with a strong emphasis on explanation rather than rote memorization. The app offers a freemium experience, with core content available for free and full course access through a subscription. It stands out by offering detailed grammatical explanations and clear sentence structures, making it ideal for learners who prefer a deeper understanding of language mechanics.

item.title: Codecademy
item.description: Codecademy offers an interactive platform for learning various programming languages and skills. It provides hands-on coding exercises directly in the browser, allowing users to see immediate results and build projects as they learn. The platform operates on a freemium model, with a substantial amount of content available for free, and a Pro subscription unlocking more advanced courses, projects, and personalized learning paths. It excels at providing a frictionless entry into coding by eliminating setup hurdles and focusing on practical application from the first lesson.

item.title: Civic Data Explorer
item.description: Civic Data Explorer is a free, open-source web application designed to help citizens and journalists understand and visualize local government data. It allows users to explore datasets related to budgets, contracts, and expenditures in an accessible format. The platform focuses on making complex financial information transparent and easy to comprehend through interactive charts and maps. It’s particularly useful for scrutinizing how public funds are allocated and spent within specific municipalities.

item.title: Curipod AI
item.description: Curipod AI is a revolutionary platform that transforms static lesson plans into dynamic, interactive learning experiences. It uses AI to help educators generate engaging activities, including polls, word clouds, and drawing boards, directly within their presentations. The tool is freemium, offering substantial value in its free tier and expanding capabilities for paid users. It excels at quickly turning a teacher's concept into a participatory lesson without requiring extensive technical skills or lesson planning time.

item.title: Perusall
item.description: Perusall is a social learning platform designed to make reading assignments more engaging and effective for students. It allows instructors to assign readings, ask questions, and students to highlight, annotate, and discuss course materials collaboratively. The platform uses an intelligent grading system that analyzes student contributions, rewarding thoughtful engagement rather than just participation. Perusall offers a free version for educators and students, with premium features for institutions. It excels at transforming passive reading into an active, social learning experience that fosters deeper comprehension.

item.title: Breathe Easy
item.description: Breathe Easy is a simple, free mobile application focused on the foundational practice of mindful breathing for stress reduction and mental clarity. It offers a variety of guided breathing exercises, including techniques like box breathing, 4-7-8 breathing, and diaphragmatic breathing, with customizable durations and visual cues. The app's core value lies in its minimalist design and straightforward approach, making complex relaxation techniques accessible to everyone. It's designed to be used anytime, anywhere, providing immediate relief from anxiety and promoting a sense of calm.

item.title: Sleep Cycle
item.description: Sleep Cycle is a popular freemium app that uses your phone's accelerometer or microphone to analyze your sleep patterns. It identifies your sleep cycles and wakes you up during your lightest sleep phase within a customizable window, aiming to make waking up feel more natural and less groggy. The app provides detailed statistics on sleep duration, quality, and disturbances, helping users understand their sleep habits. Its intelligent alarm system is its standout feature, significantly improving the waking experience for many users.

item.title: Nutrionix
item.description: Nutrionix is a sophisticated, freemium health and nutrition tracking application designed to empower users with detailed insights into their dietary habits and overall well-being. It goes beyond simple calorie counting by analyzing micronutrient intake, offering personalized meal suggestions, and tracking various health metrics like sleep and hydration. The app utilizes a vast database of foods and their nutritional profiles to provide accurate analysis. It excels at identifying potential nutrient deficiencies and suggesting balanced dietary adjustments, making it an invaluable tool for proactive health management.

item.title: codex-orange-book
item.description: The Codex Orange Book is a comprehensive, community-driven guide designed to help users master the Codex AI model. It covers everything from initial setup and installation to practical, real-world application examples. This open-source project aims to demystify the process of using advanced AI tools, providing clear, actionable instructions for both beginners and experienced users. It's a free resource, offering downloadable PDF versions for easy offline access and reference, making powerful AI accessible through detailed, step-by-step guidance.

item.title: colibri
item.description: Colibri is a revolutionary C-based engine that allows you to run extremely large AI models, such as GLM-5.2 (744B MoE), on a consumer-grade machine with as little as 25GB of RAM. It achieves this by streaming model experts directly from disk, bypassing the need for massive amounts of VRAM. This opens up powerful AI capabilities to a wider audience, making advanced natural language processing and generation accessible without expensive hardware. It's a free, zero-dependency tool, focusing on efficiency and accessibility for running complex AI.

item.title: Wasmtime Runtime
item.description: Wasmtime is a high-performance, secure, and embeddable runtime designed for executing WebAssembly (Wasm) modules outside of web browsers. Developed by the Bytecode Alliance, it provides a robust environment for running Wasm code as standalone applications or as components within larger software systems. Wasmtime leverages WebAssembly's intrinsic security model to offer a sandboxed execution environment, isolating code and preventing unintended interactions with the host system. This makes it suitable for a wide range of use cases where security and portability are paramount.

item.title: Procreate
item.description: Procreate is a professional-grade digital illustration and painting application developed exclusively for iPad. It offers a vast array of sophisticated brushes, an intuitive interface, and powerful features like layers, blending modes, and animation assist. Users can create complex artwork with a focus on responsiveness and fluidity, mimicking traditional art tools with digital precision. Procreate is a one-time purchase application, making it an accessible yet highly capable tool for artists. Its performance is optimized for the Apple Pencil and iPad hardware, delivering a seamless creative experience.

item.title: Immersive Gaussian Splat tour of grace cathedral, San Francisco
item.description: This interactive experience offers an immersive 3D tour of Grace Cathedral in San Francisco, rendered using Gaussian Splatting technology. Users can navigate through the intricately detailed digital representation of the cathedral, exploring its architecture and ambiance from various perspectives. The visualization showcases the power of Gaussian Splatting for creating realistic and detailed 3D environments from captured data, providing a unique way to experience a landmark remotely.

item.title: Ulysses
item.description: Ulysses is a streamlined writing environment designed for authors, journalists, and academics who need a distraction-free space to focus on their work. It uses a Markdown-based editor and organizes all your texts within a unified library. Key features include powerful search and filtering, goal setting (e.g., word count targets), and export options to various formats like PDF, DOCX, and ePub. Ulysses is a paid application with a free trial, available as a subscription on macOS, iOS, and iPadOS.

item.title: Qwen-Image-3.0
item.description: Qwen-Image-3.0 is an advanced image generation model developed by Alibaba Cloud, designed to produce outputs characterized by rich content, authentic details, and a demonstrable depth of understanding. It excels at interpreting intricate and nuanced textual prompts, translating them into visually coherent and contextually relevant images. This model's capability extends beyond mere aesthetic generation; it aims to imbue its creations with a significant level of factual or thematic accuracy, reflecting a deeper comprehension of the input request to deliver more meaningful visual narratives.

item.title: Artisanal AI
item.description: Artisanal AI is a premium AI-powered creative writing tool that focuses on generating nuanced and evocative prose for fiction, poetry, and scriptwriting. Unlike more utilitarian AI writers, it emphasizes artistic expression, offering fine-grained control over narrative arcs, character voices, and thematic development. This paid platform is designed for serious writers looking to augment their creative process, not replace it, providing sophisticated suggestions for dialogue, description, and plot progression. Its standout feature is its ability to generate creative content that feels genuinely novel and thoughtfully crafted.

item.title: misa77
item.description: misa77 is an experimental lossless data compression codec that aims to outperform existing standards like LZ4 in both speed and compression ratio. It decodes approximately twice as fast as LZ4 while achieving better compression, making it a compelling option for applications where storage space and decompression speed are paramount. The project is actively developed on GitHub, suggesting ongoing improvements and potential for real-world adoption in specialized use cases.

item.title: HyperDraft AI
item.description: HyperDraft AI is a sophisticated AI writing assistant designed to help users generate, refine, and expand written content across various formats, from blog posts and articles to creative fiction. It offers advanced control over tone, style, and length, acting as a powerful co-pilot for writers. This paid tool is particularly adept at brainstorming initial ideas and overcoming writer's block by providing diverse stylistic options and continuations. Its unique strength lies in its ability to maintain stylistic coherence across lengthy generated pieces.

item.title: Incremental
item.description: Incremental is a Haskell library designed for efficiently managing incremental computations. It allows developers to define computations where the result can be updated incrementally when input values change, rather than recomputing the entire result from scratch. This is particularly useful in scenarios involving complex data structures or simulations where performance is critical and many small updates are expected. The library provides a declarative way to express these dependencies and updates.

item.title: Scribe
item.description: Scribe automatically generates step-by-step guides and documentation by recording your screen as you perform tasks. It uses AI to interpret your clicks and keystrokes, transforming them into clear, annotated instructions with screenshots. This freemium tool excels at quickly creating process documentation, tutorials, and internal guides, saving immense time compared to manual creation. It integrates with popular platforms for easy sharing and embedding.

item.title: Athens Research
item.description: Athens Research is an open-source, local-first personal knowledge management tool that focuses on interconnected notes and building a second brain. It uses a graph-based approach, allowing you to link ideas, documents, and tasks bidirectionally, creating a web of knowledge that surfaces connections you might otherwise miss. It's developed by a community of researchers and knowledge workers.
